nasb.text: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; And through the rivers, they will not overflow you. When you walk through the fire, you will not be scorched, Nor will the flame burn you.

esv.text: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and through the rivers, they shall not overwhelm you; when you walk through fire you shall not be burned, and the flame shall not consume you.

cnv.text: 你從水中經過的時候，我必與你同在； 你渡過江河的時候，水必不淹沒你； 你從火中行走的時候，必不會燒傷； 火燄也不會在你身上燒起來。

ccb.text: 你穿越洪涛，我必与你同在； 你渡过江河，必不会被水淹没； 你在火中走过，必不会被烧伤， 火焰不会烧到你身上。

csbs.text: 你从水中经过，我必与你同在； 你渡过河流，水必不漫过你； 你在火中行走，必不被烧灼， 火焰也烧不着你。
